# Chapter 17: Machine learning fundamentals  (~120 pp)
- 17.1 The setup: data, model, loss (12) · 17.2 Supervised learning: regression, classification (18) · 17.3 Unsupervised learning: clustering, dimensionality reduction (15) · 17.4 Generalisation: bias-variance, regularisation (18) · 17.5 Cross-validation revisited (10) · 17.6 Decision trees, ensembles (15) · 17.7 Probabilistic graphical models (12) · 17.8 Failure section: overfitting, distribution shift, data leakage (20)

**Archetype**: optimisation, uncertainty, failure. **Project**: build a working classifier from scratch on a real dataset. **Exercises**: 35.
